name: teamsherrard-realtor
description: Team Sherrard's plug-and-play AI systems for real estate agents.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-brain
plugins.description: PLUGIN 1 — install first. The Realtor AI Brain: one shared brain (the agent's identity + memory) that powers every other system. Run 'Set up my Brain' once, and every tool already knows the agent.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-admin
plugins.description: PLUGIN 2 — the AI Admin (The Agent Leverage OS). Books the calendar, drafts email in the agent's voice, sorts the inbox, remembers every client, briefs them at 7am. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-youtube-system
plugins.description: PLUGIN 3 — the YouTube System. An always-on YouTube brain: ideation, research, SEO, scripting in the agent's own voice, lead magnets, repurposing, analytics, and coaching. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.

plugins.name: realtor-shortform-system
plugins.description: PLUGIN 4 — the Short-Form System. A routine-based short-form OS: daily green-screen reactions, talking-head value, and carousels, each optimized for Instagram/Facebook, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. The agent thinks in formats; Claude keeps the funnel balanced. Text only — never films or designs. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.
